mapper.select: SELECT bh.id AS history_id, bh.user_id, bh.product_id, bh.browse_time, p.product_name, p.main_image, p.current_price, p.original_price, p.status, p.stock, p.sales_volume FROM browse_history bh INNER JOIN product p ON bh.product_id = p.id WHERE bh.user_id = #{userId} AND bh.is_deleted = 0 AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bh.browse_time DESC
